Notice Of Hearing For Prove Up Hearing For Judgment After Default
Off Calendar Nov-07-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Angie Diner, CSR 9581. Telephone: 415-551-0612.

Aaron R. Jackson, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Blodgett, Inc., a California corporation, dba "Cable Car Cleaning."
Andrew Hart, President of Blodgett, Inc., a California corporation, dba "Cable Car Cleaning," was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defaulted defendants Ihab Shehadeh, an individual dba as "Cybelle's Pizza" or Ayman Shehadeh.
Defaults were entered against defendants on June 1, 2017.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 1, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Blodgett, Inc., a California corporation, dba "Cable Car Cleaning," and against the Defaulted Defendants Ihab Shehadeh, an individual dba as "Cybelle's Pizza" and Ayman Shehadeh, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $19,250.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,434.00.
Attorney Fees - $4,050.00.
Costs - $402.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $26,136.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
